metadata.description: Seeds 5 tailored GitHub Discussion posts in under 60 seconds — detects project type, reads your README, and generates real content.

plugins.name: seed-discussions
plugins.description: Say 'seed discussions' and get 5 project-tailored discussion posts created in your GitHub repo. Detects whether you have a Claude skill, web app, library, CLI tool, or open-source project — then generates a Roadmap post, a voting thread, a Show & Tell prompt, a tips guide, and a Q&A starter. Enables Discussions if off. Works on any public GitHub repo via the gh CLI.
